articles.title: Truist cuts Lululemon to sell, sees structural headwinds and nearly 20% downside
articles.summary: Investing.com -- Truist Securities downgraded Lululemon Athletica to Sell from Hold and slashed its price target to $94 from $115, warning that the athletic apparel retailer faces mounting structural challenges that could weigh on earnings and delay any meaningful recovery. articles.title: Lululemon Athletica (LULU) Opens Brampton Distribution Center, Is A 22% Discount Enough?
articles.summary: Lululemon athletica (LULU) has opened a 1 million square foot distribution center in Brampton, Ontario, aiming to support North American e commerce growth while grappling with higher cross border costs tied to tariffs and changes in US policy. See our latest analysis for lululemon athletica. Lululemon athletica’s share price has fallen 44.3% year to date and its 1 year total shareholder return is down 48.07%. The 7 day share price return of 3.34% hints that selling pressure may be easing...

articles.title: Lululemon (LULU) Backs Syntetica In $30 Million Nylon Recycling Round
articles.summary: Lululemon Athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU) has invested in French startup Syntetica as part of a $30 million Series A round. The funding is aimed at scaling nylon recycling technologies that can process multiple types of nylon waste in a single stream. The collaboration seeks to support more circular material flows in the global apparel supply chain. Lululemon Athletica operates in the premium athletic apparel segment, where material sourcing and supply chain transparency have become key themes...

articles.title: Lululemon Backs French Recycling Start-up Syntetica in $30 Million Series A Round
articles.summary: MAS Holdings also joined the round to build the company’s first commercial demonstration facility to recycle two types of nylon.
